creator: unkadoug@gmail.com
text: I don't think Mark's question in comment 3 has been answered.  It's not clear to me that this is reporting a regression; nothing written here says that this problem appeared only recently, or after some version.  I cannot tell whether the bug reported is in code checked in already, or in the code that the reporter is developing.  I'm sorry for my general unhelpfulness, but I don't yet understand the problem well enough to know whether some change of mine in the last year or two could have caused it.
